extension.description: Orion v3.7.0 - Complete media addon with Netflix-style interface. BIG poster cards, cyan (#00D4FF) theme. Netflix-style views for History, Favorites, Continue Watching. Netflix-style Trakt integration. Netflix-style Settings panel. Season dropdown and episode grid. Master skin toggle in Settings to switch between Netflix and classic list view.
extension.news: [3.7.6] PunchPlay.tv is BETA / placeholder. The full Trakt-parity menu (watchlist, collection, watched, lists, recommendations, trending, popular, scrobbling) is wired up, but not every endpoint on the PunchPlay backend is live yet — some lists may return empty until the PunchPlay team finishes their public API. Banners and labels added everywhere PunchPlay appears so users know what to expect. [3.7.5] PunchPlay.tv now has full Trakt-parity: watchlist, collection, watched history, custom & liked lists, recommendations, trending and popular. Right-click context menu supports Remove from Watchlist/Collection/History/List. Netflix-style PunchPlay submenu. Auto-mark watched at 80%+ (movies and episodes). Settings > PunchPlay now accepts your Client ID and Client Secret. [3.7.4] Fix: Trakt list items can now be removed via right-click context menu (custom lists, collection, watched history). New: PunchPlay.tv integration — device-code login + automatic scrobbling alongside Trakt during episode playback. Settings > PunchPlay to authorize. [3.7.0] Netflix-style History, Favorites, Continue Watching grids. Netflix-style Settings panel. All views use proper poster art. Trakt fully skinned. Master skin toggle controls everything. [3.6.2] Wider poster tiles, SEASONS button fix, back navigation fix.
